author: @ColRubyDimples
text: Electricity is the ultimate carrot to dangle in front of a human! Thank you Robert!

author: @edwardhughes352
text: Hi Rob your hemp battery got a mention on "real coffee with Scott Adams" today at about 44 mins.

author: @zylascope
text: Another great use for the dynapod. Looks like it wouldn't take much time to fill the phone. Congrats on 200K subs Rob. Well done :)

author: @TrentTationnaiseXization
text: Nifty little box that is. I once struggled to make a belt...

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I have made quite a few now and it is a pain

replies.author: @Teknopottu
replies.text: How did you guys make these belts? Must have missed a video from Rob if he had one of this topic.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate

author: @stevenfaber3896
text: Love the videos, but I can never see the results on your meter, can you turn up the contrast or something?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I tried to turn the back light off - couldn't find out how to do it - but I will try mate

replies.author: @stevenfaber3896
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering Thanks. Wouldn't want someone else saying ahh he can't get those kind of numbers. Lol

author: @kilokilos
text: With the sweat if thyne brow thou shalt charge thyme cellphone.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - verily

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate

author: @Mark-kh2in
text: I take my hat off to you Robert... You should patent and sell these things!!!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: to be honest mate - I prefer to give them away to anyone who could use them

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: worth it I think mate

replies.author: @samuelthomasengardio
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering I want to build a Bicycle water pump to run a big water wheel in the future. It would be a simple way of applying neccessary constant directional torque to a tractor PTO Generator. Too many projects on the burner at the moment.

replies.author: @samuelthomasengardio
replies.text: It sounds crazy, put the human legs could easily drive a system that could have an output of 10kw

author: @docink6175
text: that little gennie would also work from a wind machine... interesting bit of kit for 20bucks

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: yes it would mate and yes it was a good buy I think

author: @stevetobias4890
text: Very cool Rob. Imagine the power that all the gyms in the country could generate. More than enough to run the lights in each gym.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: and all that sweat basically goes to waste right now!

replies.author: @zylascope
replies.text: Good point.

replies.author: @stevetobias4890
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering so you could say that the gyms have a lot of potential sweat equity 😅

replies.author: @iancrosby3475
replies.text:
Imagine the incentive to get people into local authority leisure centre gyms if customers could bring the key card for their electricity meter and top it up on the treadmill or rowing machine instead of at the corner shop. It's putting cash in the pockets of people that need it most,  saving the planet and getting people fit. Win win win.

Furthermore I'm not suggesting hard labour or anything but  every prison has a gym.  Imagine prisoners working (out)  to contribute to the electricity bills of their family on the outside

author: @chuxxsss
text: Or is it a blue box or a Taris generating power for you Rob. Now kick Luke out of the box mate, your the doctor.  Lol

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - it does have rather a nice Tardis blue doesn't it lol

replies.author: @chuxxsss
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering Yes indeed.

author: @dremaboy777
text:
Rob... It's been a few years now, that we can't see any readings on your meter 😂😂😂.  I think it's something to do with 'that' particular LCD screen and it's back lighting. Even when you show it closer it's near impossible to see the readings. 
But like I once said to someone in a comment "Robs' word is as good as graphene". 

Carry on.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I did try and turn the back light off mate - but failed to find out how - it is why I try to say - but the phone charging up doesn't give an exact figure but then you do know it's working - the device itself is advertised as a 20W genni if that helps mate

replies.author: @Teknopottu
replies.text: I've always zoomed the video a bit and sometimes figured out the readings turning my phone's brightness down a bit.

author: @AndreaDingbatt
text:
Thank you for your enthusiasm, information and wonderful laugh!!
You are inspiring me, and a whole load of other people!!
Decentralisation and the approach that you take, plus people power, can definatly turn the Energy Crisis into the Energy Relvolution! 🙂
Thank you so much for the inspiration!! Andrea, Jasper and George the Pigeon. XxX.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: wow - cheers mate and thank you for taking the time to post that - all the best - Rob

author: @joohop
text:
My Electric Got Cut Off Last Christmas And Was Off For 2 Weeks So I Bought That Little Blue Box And It Got Me Through Charging My Phone , We Really Do Take Mains Electricity For Granted 
Bless Up Fella

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate and nice share

author: @Jay-mq6jh
text: Wow! Could you now instruct me on how to hack the family Pelaton cycle?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I am guessing it is exactly like all other exercise bikes mate - only with a nice cover - take the cover off and it will look the same

replies.author: @Jay-mq6jh
replies.text:
@ThinkingandTinkering- I do believe that if circumstances demanded that I had to, for the survival of me and mine, I would be able to.
I admit that my understanding of the principles are basic.
Truly I am way more intrigued with your “earth batteries”. Specifically what the relationship between the electrodes are, and their positions on the periodic table.
Forever grateful for the personal response!
Have an outstanding day!

author: @nitrousman8882
text: Hey, don't forget the important benefit of healthy exercise, especially during these difficult COVID times!  If you're going to spend your time watching TV, offset the harm by doing it on your DynaPOD.  I can see it now.... "Buns of Steel - the Murray-Smith way" :)  Well done!  Doug

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - multi tasking it all the way mate lol
